ivable , Executable , Instantiable , ModelErrorHandler , MoMLExportable , Moveable , Nameable , java.io.Serializable, TypedActor public class Triangular extends RandomSource Produce a random sequence with a triangular distribution. On each iteration

with a triangular distribution. On each iteration, a new random number is produced. The output port is of type double. The values that are generated are independent and identically distributed with mode and bounds as defined by the parameters.

th mode and bounds as defined by the parameters. In addition, the seed can be specified as a parameter to control the sequence that is generated. Since: Ptolemy II 5.2 Version: $Id: Triangular.java,v 1.4 2006/08/21 23:53:20 cxh Exp $ Author: Raymo
